access_string.description: The access string that defines the permissions for the MemoryDB user.

arn.description: The Amazon Resource Name (ARN) of the MemoryDB user.

authentication_mode.description: The authentication mode used by the MemoryDB user, including password details.

id.description: The unique identifier for the MemoryDB user.

minimum_engine_version.description: The minimum engine version required for the MemoryDB user.

tags.description: A map of tags assigned to the MemoryDB user for identification and organization.
